---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-single">

  <!-- ── Header (centered, elegant) ── -->
  <header class="header reveal">
    <img src="pic1.jpg" alt="Giuseppe Peressotti" class="header-photo">
    <h1 class="header-name">Giuseppe Peressotti</h1>
    <p class="header-subtitle">PhD Candidate in Public Policy &amp; Political Economy</p>
    <p class="header-institution">The University of Texas at Dallas</p>
    <span class="header-market">On the 2026–2027 Job Market</span>

    <div class="header-links">
      <a href="mailto:Giuseppe.Peressotti@utdallas.edu">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor"><path d="M.05 3.555A2 2 0 0 1 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 1 1.95 1.555L8 8.414.05 3.555ZM0 4.697v7.104l5.803-3.558L0 4.697ZM6.761 8.83l-6.57 4.027A2 2 0 0 0 2 14h12a2 2 0 0 0 1.808-1.144l-6.57-4.027L8 9.586l-1.239-.757Zm3.436-.586L16 11.801V4.697l-5.803 3.546Z"/></svg>
        Email
      </a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=qdYq504AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor"><path d="M8.211 2.047a.5.5 0 0 0-.422 0l-7.5 3.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .025.917l7.5 3a.5.5 0 0 0 .372 0L14 7.14V13a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v2h3v-2a1 1 0 0 0-1-1V6.739l.686-.275a.5.5 0 0 0 .025-.917l-7.5-3.5Z"/><path d="M4.176 9.032a.5.5 0 0 0-.656.327l-.5 1.7a.5.5 0 0 0 .294.605l4.5 1.8a.5.5 0 0 0 .372 0l4.5-1.8a.5.5 0 0 0 .294-.605l-.5-1.7a.5.5 0 0 0-.656-.327L8 10.466 4.176 9.032Z"/></svg>
        Scholar
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/giuseppe-peressotti-57b6a614b/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor"><path d="M0 1.146C0 .513.526 0 1.175 0h13.65C15.474 0 16 .513 16 1.146v13.708c0 .633-.526 1.146-1.175 1.146H1.175C.526 16 0 15.487 0 14.854V1.146zm4.943 12.248V6.169H2.542v7.225h2.401zm-1.2-8.212c.837 0 1.358-.554 1.358-1.248-.015-.709-.52-1.248-1.342-1.248-.822 0-1.359.54-1.359 1.248 0 .694.521 1.248 1.327 1.248h.016zm4.908 8.212V9.359c0-.216.016-.432.08-.586.173-.431.568-.878 1.232-.878.869 0 1.216.662 1.216 1.634v3.865h2.401V9.25c0-2.22-1.184-3.252-2.764-3.252-1.274 0-1.845.7-2.165 1.193v.025h-.016a5.54 5.54 0 0 1 .016-.025V6.169h-2.4c.03.678 0 7.225 0 7.225h2.4z"/></svg>
        LinkedIn
      </a>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="content">

    <!-- About -->
    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">About</div>
      <div class="about-text">
        I study trade policy, digital governance, and international institutional design, with a second research program on civil resistance and democratic transitions. My work has been published in the <em>European Journal of International Relations</em> and the <em>Journal of Peace Research</em>.
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Research Interests -->
    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Research Interests</div>
      <div class="tags">
        <div class="tag"><span>Digital Trade Governance</span></div>
        <div class="tag"><span>Preferential Trade Agreements</span></div>
        <div class="tag"><span>Network Analysis</span></div>
        <div class="tag"><span>Civil Resistance &amp; Democratization</span></div>
        <div class="tag"><span>Institutional Design</span></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Selected Work -->
    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Selected Work</div>
      <div>
        <div class="section-subhead">Published</div>
        <div class="pub">
          <div class="pub-title">Digital Provision Inclusion in Trade Agreements: the Death of (Digital) Distance through a Gravity Model Approach</div>
          <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong> (2025). <em>European Journal of International Relations</em>. <span class="pub-status">OnlineFirst</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="pub">
          <div class="pub-title">Mapping the ROAD to Democracy: A Global Dataset of Overturning Attempts and Organizations in Civil Resistance Transitions</div>
          <div class="pub-meta">Elmore, Naela, Kashmiri Medhi, <strong>Giuseppe Peressotti</strong>, and Jonathan Pinckney (2026). <em>Journal of Peace Research</em>. <span class="pub-status">Online Early</span></div>
        </div>

        <div class="section-subhead">Working Papers</div>
        <div class="pub">
          <div class="pub-title">Why Take a Detour: The Strategic Choice Between Bilateral and Multilateral PTAs</div>
          <div class="pub-meta">Ye, Huei-Jyun and <strong>Giuseppe Peressotti</strong></div>
        </div>
        <div class="pub">
          <div class="pub-title">Rulemakers and Ruletakers in Digital Trade Governance: Network Structure and the Diffusion of Digital Provisions in Preferential Trade Agreements</div>
          <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong></div>
        </div>
        <div class="pub">
          <div class="pub-title">Entrepreneurship, Informal, and Formal Markets: A Humanomics Study of Guatemala</div>
          <div class="pub-meta"><strong>Peressotti, Giuseppe</strong> and Ricardo R. Noé</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Beyond -->
    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Beyond</div>
      <div class="beyond-text">
        When not researching, I enjoy lifting weights, hunting the best coffee shops in the cities I visit, and nerding out on my espresso setup at home.
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <p class="footer-text">&copy; 2026 Giuseppe Peressotti</p>
</footer>
```
